_readme: Set active=true to enable a client. Set active=false to pause without deleting. Mode: automated or draft_approval.

clients._comment: PT Tampa Bay Test Campaign — vito@argusreach.com inbox, draft_approval mode
clients.title: Founder
clients.icp_summary: Independent PT clinic owners in Tampa Bay area. We are reaching out to offer physician referral outreach services - identifying PCPs, orthos, and sports med docs in their market and managing outreach on their behalf.
clients.compliance_note: Do not make any clinical claims, do not promise specific referral numbers or revenue outcomes, do not discuss insurance reimbursement rates
clients.positioning_note: ArgusReach is a tool that helps clinic owners make more sales and build physician networks - we are not replacing their sales efforts or relationships. We identify the right doctors and manage outreach on their behalf so they can focus on patient care. Emphasize partnership and amplification, not replacement.

clients._comment: EXAMPLE CLIENT — copy this block to add a new client, fill in all fields, set active=true
clients.icp_summary: Business owners post-exit, HNW individuals 50-65 in Tampa Bay seeking wealth management after a liquidity event, inheritance, or business sale
clients.compliance_note: No specific return promises, no mention of specific securities or investment strategies, no performance guarantees of any kind
clients.positioning_note: Describe how ArgusReach positions itself for this client's outreach

_field_notes.id: Unique snake_case identifier — used in APPROVE/REJECT commands and log files
_field_notes.mode: automated = AI responds immediately; draft_approval = AI drafts, Vito gets Telegram message to APPROVE or REJECT
_field_notes.outreach_email: The dedicated Gmail on the client's domain — NOT their main email
_field_notes.app_password: 16-char Gmail App Password (Google Account > Security > App Passwords). Never their actual password.
_field_notes.client_email: Where to send monthly reports — the client's actual inbox
_field_notes.launch_date: YYYY-MM-DD format — the date the first campaign email was sent
_field_notes.campaign_name: Human-readable campaign name shown in Telegram alerts and reports
_field_notes.contacts_per_month: How many contacts are in the monthly send (from Instantly plan)
_field_notes.vertical: RIA | Insurance | PhysicalTherapy | MentalHealth | CommercialRE | ProfessionalServices | Other
_field_notes.tone: warm-professional | formal | conversational — affects AI response style
_field_notes.compliance_note: What the AI should NEVER say or promise for this client specifically
_field_notes.instantly_campaign_id: Campaign ID from Instantly dashboard. IMPORTANT: all campaigns must be created with stop_on_reply=true in Instantly UI — this handles sequence pausing automatically when a prospect replies.
